name: Pizza Crostini
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 10-15 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, toss the bread slices with the olive oil and garlic powder. Sprinkle with the dried oregano.
Arrange the bread slices over the prepared baking sheet.
Top with the mozzarella cheese. Bake again until the cheese is completely melted, about 2-5 minutes.
